mapper.select: SELECT * FROM content_topics WHERE status = 1 AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY (participant_count * 0.6 + content_count * 0.4) DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 END) as enabledCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 END) as disabledCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 END) as reviewingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 END) as rejectedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_hot = 1 THEN 1 END) as hotCount, COALESCE(SUM(participant_count), 0) as totalParticipantCount, COALESCE(SUM(content_count), 0) as totalContentCount FROM content_topics WHERE del_flag = 0
SELECT * FROM content_topics WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT t.*, u.realname as creatorName, u.avatar as creatorAvatar FROM content_topics t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON t.creator_id = u.id WHERE t.id = #{topicId} AND t.del_flag = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND status = 'published' AND del_flag = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT author_id) FROM content WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND status = 'published' AND del_flag = 0

SELECT t.*, COUNT(c.id) as recentContentCount FROM content_topics t LEFT JOIN content c ON t.id = c.topic_id AND c.create_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL #{days} DAY AND c.status = 'published' AND c.del_flag = 0 WHERE t.status = 1 AND t.del_flag = 0 GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY recentContentCount DESC, t.participant_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT * FROM content_topics WHERE (topic_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR topic_desc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND status = 1 AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY participant_count DESC, content_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, topic_name, topic_desc, cover_image, participant_count, content_count, is_hot, status, creator_id, create_time, update_time FROM content_topics WHERE del_flag = 0
AND id IN
#{id}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
